overview: Sant Longowal Institute of Engineering and Technology (SLIET), established in 1989 by the Ministry of Education, Government of India, is a premier Centrally Funded Technical Institute (CFTI) and Deemed University located in Longowal, Sangrur, Punjab. Set across a sprawling green campus, SLIET was created to provide specialized technical education across certificate, diploma, undergraduate, and postgraduate streams. The institute is fully government-funded and acts as an autonomous body catering to global industrial engineering trends.
accreditation: Deemed-to-be-University status granted by UGC; Ranked 79th by NIRF 2025 under the Engineering category. Programs are routinely reviewed and approved by AICTE parameters.

coursesAndFees.program: B.E. / B.Tech Programs (CSE, Mechanical, Electrical, Food Tech, etc.)
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹52,400 per year (Approx. ₹2,10,000 total tuition fee for 4 years).
₹12,800 per year (Approx. ₹38,400 total tuition fee for 3 years).

placements.avgSalary: ₹4.00 LPA – ₹11.07 LPA (Course & branch variant average spectrum)
placements.totalOffers: Strong active enrollment in drives with multi-sector opportunities each year
placements.companiesVisited: TCS, Cognizant, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Godrej, Tata Motors, Mahindra & Mahindra
placements.internshipHighlights: Mandatory industrial training segments tied with primary manufacturing and tech hubs

examsAccepted: SLIET SET (SNC / SET I / SET III)
admissions.admissionProcess: B.E. admissions are routed via JoSAA/CSAB counselling based on JEE Main ranks. M.Tech and M.Sc admissions rely on CCMT/CCMN portals. Certificate, Diploma, and lateral entries are managed directly via the SLIET Entrance Test (SET).
admissions.importantDates: Online registration for entrance streams generally runs from February through April annually. National level counseling schedules sync with central CSAB/CCMT windows.

facilities: Boys Hostels (Multiple blocks partitioned by course years)
campus.specialNote: Hostel room assignment criteria strictly separate ICD, early-year UG, final-year single occupancy, and PG scholars to maximize comfort. Mess charges are variable and managed separately from basic seat rents.

contact.address: Sant Longowal Institute of Engineering and Technology, Longowal – 148106, Distt. Sangrur, Punjab, India

scholarships.meritScholarships: Merit-cum-Means (MCM) internal scholarships awarded to top performing students every academic semester.
scholarships.fullWaiver: Tuition fee waivers are provided under government norms for top JEE rankers during central selection allocation.
scholarships.partialWaiver: State and Central sector scholarship models matching family economic conditions.
scholarships.governmentAid: Dr. Ambedkar Post Matric Scholarship Scheme for Punjab residents alongside National Scholarship Schemes (NSP) for PG/SC/ST candidates.
